message.content:
The screen features a **split layout**: a white left panel with text/controls and a dark right panel showing a laptop mockup.  

### Left Panel (White Background):  
- Header: "Welcome to Sana Agents" + "Join or create a workspace" (gray subtitle).  
- Two sections:  
  1. "Create a new workspace" (button with loading spinner, gray text: "Set up from scratch...").  
  2. "Not seeing your workspace?" (link: "Try logging in with a different email"; "Log out" button).  
- Footer: "Signed in as alexsmith@content-mobbin.com" (gray text).  

### Right Panel (Dark Mockup):  
- Laptop displaying a dark interface with a bright yellow task card ("Update Salesforce opportunity...") and other UI elements (chat, tasks, integrations).  

### Colors:  
- Left: White background, black text, gray accents.  
- Right: Dark (black/gray) mockup, bright yellow task card.  
- Footer: Dark gray with "Sana AI" (white) and "curated by Mobbin" (white).  

### Interactions:  
- Buttons/links for workspace creation, login, logout.  
- Loading spinner indicates an active process.
